message:
feat: hybrid architecture with pipe for screencast + 3 websockets for input

Separates high-bandwidth screencast from interactive input to prevent
input lag when frames are being transmitted.

- Pipe transport: screencast frames (high bandwidth)
- mouse_ws: dedicated websocket for mouse events
- keyboard_ws: dedicated websocket for keyboard events
- nav_ws: dedicated websocket for navigation commands

Each input type uses its own channel to prevent blocking.
Fallback to pipe if websockets fail to connect.
